title: cicer arietinum subsp. arietinum
intro: Cicer arietinum subsp. arietinum, commonly known as chickpea or gram, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is widely cultivated for its edible seeds, which are a rich source of protein and fiber. The medicinal properties of Cicer arietinum subsp. arietinum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, manage diabetes, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of consuming chickpea seeds include reducing the risk of heart disease, managing weight, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Cicer arietinum subsp. arietinum include roasted chickpea seeds, which can be used as a coffee substitute, and chickpea flour, which can be used as a gluten-free alternative in baking.
